name: Old Hickory Credit Union - Donelson Branch
description_short: Old Hickory Credit Union is a member-owned financial institution offering checking, savings, loans, and credit cards with competitive rates and digital banking tools.
description_long: Old Hickory Credit Union is a credit union serving members in the Nashville area, including the Donelson branch location. As a member-owned cooperative financial institution, it operates under the credit union model rather than as a traditional bank, meaning profits are returned to members through better rates and lower fees. The credit union offers a comprehensive range of consumer financial products including free Kasasa checking accounts with interest earnings up to 4.50% APY, auto loans starting at 5.50% APR, mortgage loans, home equity lines of credit (HELOC) with introductory rates of 6.99% APR for 12 months, VISA credit cards from 9.49% APR, share certificates at 3.75% APY, and youth savings accounts with grade-based incentives. They also provide mobile banking with biometric login, mobile deposit, bill pay, fund transfers, card management tools, and branch/ATM locators. What distinguishes Old Hickory Credit Union is its emphasis on community support, including scholarship programs for members' educational goals and youth financial education initiatives like their Money Smarts program that pays students for good grades. The credit union actively promotes fraud awareness and member protection, with prominent notices about scam prevention and secure contact information. Their Kasasa checking account includes 3% cashback on debit purchases, positioning it competitively against traditional checking offerings. However, like all credit unions, membership may involve eligibility requirements, and the institution's service area appears concentrated in the Nashville/Donelson region. Their product offerings and rates are competitive within the credit union space, though rates fluctuate with market conditions and individual qualification varies.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Free Kasasa checking with up to 4.50% APY on balances up to $10,000 and 3% cashback on debit purchases
Competitive auto loan rates starting at 5.50% APR
HELOC with introductory rate of 6.99% APR for first 12 months
Youth account program that pays members $2 per top grade and up to $50 for new account opening
Full-featured mobile banking app with biometric login, mobile deposit, and bill pay
Scholarship program supporting members' educational aspirations
Surcharge-free ATM network and multiple branch locations
Strong fraud protection awareness and member security communication
cons: Likely membership eligibility requirements typical of credit unions, not open to all consumers
Service area appears limited to Nashville/Donelson region
Rates and terms subject to individual qualification and market conditions
No indication of online account opening for non-members or remote membership eligibility
best_for: Nashville-area residents seeking competitive checking accounts with interest earnings and debit card rewards
Credit union members looking for auto loans and home financing at competitive rates
Families wanting youth financial education programs combined with savings incentives
Members prioritizing digital banking convenience with mobile deposit and biometric security
diagnosis: Old Hickory Credit Union is best for Nashville-area residents who qualify for membership and want competitive rates on checking, savings, loans, and credit products combined with strong fraud protection and community-focused benefits. The main caveat is that credit union membership typically requires eligibility criteria and the institution's service area appears geographically limited to the Nashville region.
services: Free Kasasa checking accounts with interest and cashback rewards
Mortgage loans for home purchase and refinance
Home equity lines of credit (HELOC) with introductory rates
Youth savings accounts with grade incentives
Mobile banking app with biometric login
Bill pay and fund transfer services
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
